entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Hi,

I had to abandon the change supposed to bring in this commit as it deleted the yarn.lock file. This file is already in the master, and it seems that deleting breaks the build. I therefore pushed a new change without the file deletion. The other modifications have already been reviewed by Ojas and Vasyl.

Thank you in advance for your help,

Francis.
